era: Hip-Hop. E=8 -- NEW ABSOLUTE ENGINE MAXIMUM. Late-career intensity. Ceiling shatters. Scale expands 1-7 to 1-8. v1.49.329.

location.formative: South Seattle hip-hop. Rainier Valley diversity. Uncompromising artistry.
location.career: DoNormaal. Self-released. Second entry (first at 175, E=7). Late career.

members.name: DoNormaal
members.note: Rainier Valley. Two entries (175 E=7, 188 E=8). First artist to break E=7. NEW ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM.

theory_nodes.concept: E=8 NEW ABSOLUTE ENGINE MAXIMUM -- the first entry to exceed E=7. Scale expands from 1-7 to 1-8. Structural earthquake. Retroactively changes context of every previous entry.
examples: E=1 (187) to E=8 (188) in one degree.
theory_nodes.description: E=8. NEW ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM. Ceiling shatters.

genealogy.relationship: DoNormaal late career at 188. First to break E=7.

theory_nodes.concept: E=1 to E=8 in one degree -- degree 187 (Harbor Porpoise, E=1 new minimum) to degree 188 (DoNormaal, E=8 new maximum). Full energy range in consecutive degrees. Widest range in engine history.
theory_nodes.description: E=1 to E=8 in one degree. Full range. Consecutive.

genealogy.relationship: DoNormaal at 188. Maximum follows minimum immediately.

theory_nodes.concept: Late-career intensity exceeding early career -- accumulated urgency, production complexity, uncompromising vision push beyond early-career E=7 to late-career E=8.
examples: Maturity + density + control = exceeds raw intensity.
Second artist with two entries (after Stas THEE Boss).

genealogy.relationship: DoNormaal at 188. Late career exceeds early.

cross_references.relationship: FIRST ENTRY! E=7. The foundation. Late career (188, E=8) exceeds it.
E=7 TO E=8 IN ONE DEGREE! Previous degree was E=7. Now E=8. Immediate ceiling-break.
E=7 SURPASSED! Scene architect at E=7. DoNormaal exceeds through accumulated late-career intensity.
